title: euphrasia officinalis subsp. anglica
intro: Euphrasia officinalis subsp. anglica, also known as the English eye-bright, is a flowering plant species of the family Orobanchaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat eye and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis subsp. anglica include reducing eye strain and inflammation, relieving respiratory congestion, and soothing coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and eye drops, which are often used to treat conjunctivitis, colds, and other respiratory conditions.
